SR_SPLMTL_FINCL_1_CD 

LABEL: Supplemental HRSN Financial Strain 1: How Hard to Pay for Basics 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) Supplemental health related social need (HRSN) financial strain telling how hard 
it is to pay for basics like food, housing, medical care, and heating.

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system
